text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a day out in town with Daiwa Scarlet, I walk
her back to the dorms.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Phew... That was wonderful! It's nice taking things easy once in a while! ♪

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
And I'm sure it was a nice change of pace for you
too, right? I mean, with me around, there's no
way you couldn't have fun.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...You did have fun, right?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: O-oh, gosh! Just look how dark it's gotten!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
...You know, now that I think about it, coming
back this late probably isn't a good look for a
model student.
choice_data_list: Just think of it as part of training!
Is it really that big of a deal?
Is it really that big of a deal?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
What are you saying? There's no way that excuses
it.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
But, if I start training now, then it won't just be an
excuse, right?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
...I meant that as a joke, but now I'm itching to
get on the track.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
All right! That excursion was just a warm-up for
the real training! Time to stretch my legs!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: And you're coming with me, obviously!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet spends the whole training session
with a huge grin.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Of course it is! If people saw us coming back
together, they might think we... went somewhere
tog—

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Urgh, never mind! The point is, yes, it's a
problem! It could harm my reputation!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Well, I mean... it's not like I have an issue with going off campus with you...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I just don't want people getting the wrong idea,
thinking we're chummy or anything.
choice_data_list: Just pretend I dragged you out for a break.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you couldn't "drag" me anywhere if you
tried. Besides, blaming you makes you sound bad.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You might end up being removed as my trainer,
and... I don't want that.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
But I know you're just worrying over my
reputation, so... I guess what I mean is...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Thanks.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Something seems to have put her in a good
mood.
